visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a graphic header titled '眼力大考驗' resembling a school test paper with blanks for class, seat number, and name. A central circular aperture provides a view of a vast green field under a clear blue sky, where three minute human figures stand far away in the distance along a central dirt path. (2) The circular frame undergoes a steady digital zoom into the landscape. As the frame tightens, the three figures become larger and more distinct; they are two adult males and one adult female standing side-by-side. A small red-roofed house icon appears behind them. (3) The zoom settles into a medium shot. The female character on the left has long dark hair, wearing a white top, smiling and pointing upwards. The two male characters on the right both wear glasses and have long hair, standing shoulder-to-shoulder. A handwritten red text prompt appears at the top right of the frame as they maintain a stationary pose.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 寶島眼鏡. [Variety]: 眼力大考驗. [Slogan]: 班級： 座號： 姓名：. [Subtitle]: 問 圖中的寶島眼鏡 2025 雙代言人是？ (2) [Variety]: 再靠近一點點～ (3) [Subtitle]: 解 就是動力火車和美食水水千千. [Variety]: 你答對了嗎？

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 3 main spokespersons appear in the central circle
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One female with long dark hair in a white sleeveless top; two males with long dark hair wearing spectacles and casual collared shirts.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A composite background featuring a white school-paper graphic overlaying a scenic view of lush green agricultural fields stretching into the horizon under a bright sky.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio track opens with high-energy, upbeat electronic pop music featuring a strong percussive beat and bright synthesizer pads. A male narrator with clear, professional articulation asks a riddle-like question regarding the brand's spokespersons. The vocal delivery is friendly and energetic. (2) As the visual zoom occurs, a subtle whoosh-like transition effect is heard. The narrator's pitch rises playfully while saying 'A little closer', maintaining a high arousal level that aligns with the interactive game format of the clip. (3) A sharp, bright 'ding' sound effect marks the revelation of the answer. The narrator confirms the names of the celebrities with confident, conclusive prosody. The music remains consistent in tempo and energy until the track cuts cleanly at the end.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as an interactive promotional announcement for Formosa Optical (寶島眼鏡) to reveal their 2025 brand spokespersons, utilizing an 'eye power test' game format to engage the audience before the final reveal.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly uses the brand logo '寶島眼鏡' and names the celebrities as the '2025 dual spokespersons' for the brand.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively combines a gamified visual approach with high-energy audio to create a memorable brand announcement.
